name: System organisation shell
purpose: Create one fake First Nations Governance Commons organisation with public demo hostname only.

name: Commons public assembly
purpose: Reusable public templates, release notes, contributor rules, and non-sensitive process models.

name: Community Governance Hub
purpose: Main First Nations organisation hub with meetings, proposals, rules, accountability, and updates.

name: First Nations Toastmasters controlled sample
purpose: Fake/sample pilot process for speeches, roles, meeting feedback, motions, and learning outcomes.

name: Authority approval process
purpose: Private-only approval flow for quorum, conditions, go/hold/no-go, expiry, and stop rules.

name: IDS and privacy review process
purpose: Private-only review of data purpose, access, retention, deletion, notice, consent, and incident route.

name: Provider handoff room
purpose: Fake-data provider scope, contract gates, delivery evidence, and source-code handover.

name: Partner accountability tracker
purpose: Partner commitments, responses, due dates, public-safe progress, and unresolved issues.

name: Participatory budget rehearsal
purpose: Fake priority budget votes and allocations after proposal and meeting flows are stable.

name: Yarning circle meeting calendar
purpose: Public-safe meeting schedule, agenda, minutes template, and offline-import route.

name: Support and access route
purpose: Private support route for access needs, incidents, pause triggers, and affected-person support.

name: Public accountability updates
purpose: Public-safe what changed updates, accepted actions, delivery status, and archive summaries.
